commit_message:
feat(ui): Phase 5 — T21 Evidence.jsx + T22 EvidenceItem.jsx + App.jsx wire

T21 — src/ui/views/Evidence.jsx
- Chronological evidence timeline, reads public/data/events.json
- Color-coded by event type

feat(governance): post-commit hook — session-to-commit linker

Closes I2 gap: every commit now records which session produced it,
which files changed, and which agent was running.

Writes to evidence/
